name: Java
description: Robust, object-oriented, platform-independent language extensively used for enterprise server-side applications, Android app development, and large-scale backend systems.

name: Python
description: High-level interpreted language known for its readability, versatility, and vast ecosystem. The dominant language in Machine Learning, Data Science, Scripting, and Web backends.

name: TypeScript
description: Strict syntactical superset of JavaScript adding static typing, interfaces, and advanced type constraints. Standard for modern enterprise frontend and full-stack Node.js development.

name: JavaScript
description: The scripting language of the web. Essential for client-side interactivity and runs server-side via Node.js.

name: SQL
description: Structured Query Language used to manage, store, query, and manipulate data in relational database management systems.

name: Go
description: Compiled, statically typed language designed by Google. Highly popular for cloud-native applications, microservices, containerization tools, and low-latency backend systems.
